# Mail Activity Done

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:5a0ce87bede46ee3ef4aca69080182899705bb737283ce6f2e369921f635edf0
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module implements the capability to keep activities that have been
completed, for future reporting, by setting them with the boolean
'Done'.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Access to an activity from the systray activities menu.
2. Once finished, open the activity and mark it as Done.

To check activities:

1. Go to Settings -> Technical -> Activities
2. To see finished activities filter by Completed Activities

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/social/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/social/issues/new?body=module:%20mail_activity_done%0Aversion:%2017.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

methods.name: odoo.addons.mail_activity_done.models.mail_activity.MailActivity.unlink
documentation: Don't unlink if we're asked not to

methods.name: odoo.addons.mail_activity_done.models.mail_activity.MailActivity._action_done
documentation: Ask super not to delete the activity and set it to done

methods.name: odoo.addons.mail_activity_done.models.mail_activity.MailActivityMixin._read_progress_bar
documentation:
Exclude completed activities from progress bar result.
Pass an extra domain to super to filter out records with only done activities.

functions.name: odoo.addons.mail_activity_done.hooks.pre_init_hook
documentation:
The objective of this hook is to default to false all values of field
'done' of mail.activity

functions.name: odoo.addons.mail_activity_done.hooks.uninstall_hook
documentation:
The objective of this hook is to remove all activities that are done
upon module uninstall
